Sage Bot Item Code: A262


Other locations the gear can be found
Alliance Challenge - Magic Well
Star of Life Artifact

Triggers: 3 sec

Break of Silence
The unit casts silence upon 3 random enemy units for 4 sec. For 4 sec., these enemy units cannot use any of their abilities (except those granted by the equipped set). When the duration of silencing ends, the artifact's owner tears the armor of the ability's targets and all enemy units in a small radius around them. When their armor is torn, the enemy units receive 224000 pure damage, and their physical armor is reduced by 25% for 4 sec. These enemy units also receive 256000 physical damage for 4 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
